name: align-active-codex-task-detection
title: Align active Codex task detection
description: Exclude Codex Desktop temporary Chat workspaces from the programming-task HUD so running counts match project coding tasks.
creator: dev2019zheng
notes: Excluded Codex Desktop temporary chat workspaces under ~/Documents/Codex/<date>/... from the default programming-task HUD. Verified the user's live Codex DB query resolves to two project tasks. Checks: cargo fmt --all -- --check, cargo test --workspace, pnpm --filter @codex-beacon/desktop tauri:build --bundles app.
